title: Resource implementation guidance applies the framework ephemeral-resource pattern

provenance.originSummary: Derived from a sanitized real PR or review incident.
provenance.whyItMattered: Use this as the adjudicated implementation-guidance case for the framework ephemeral-resource workflow.
provenance.genericCondition: Sanitized fixture models a real implementation-guidance pattern without retaining live PR identity.

description: A sanitized implementation-guidance scenario where a contributor starts a provider ephemeral resource but drifts toward ordinary CRUD resource patterns. The correct guidance should require the framework ephemeral pattern and its companion artifacts.

scope.notes: Sanitized fixture models a implementation-guidance pattern.

mustCatch.description: The guidance should require the framework ephemeral pattern with `sdk.EphemeralResource` and `Open(...)` rather than CRUD resource methods.
The guidance should require `EphemeralResources()` registration plus companion docs and Terraform 1.10-gated tests for the ephemeral resource.

mustNotFlag.description: The guidance must not steer the contributor toward ordinary CRUD resource lifecycle methods for an ephemeral resource.

mustHaveSections: minimal set of code changes needed

notes: Use this as the adjudicated implementation-guidance case for the framework ephemeral-resource workflow.
